title: Battery Pack that was posted
wikitext:
[]: Battery Pack that was posted             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Thu Apr 22, 2010 10:28 am Not sure if this belongs in fandom. When the battery packs release on may 16 on evastore, I sure hope it will be easy to buy one, even translated, the buttons themselves could not be translated from Japanese for me to try a pre order, and I don't want to inadvertently do something wrong just clicking one that looks like the right one. Any advice or help on a pre order or advice when they become available?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Apr 22, 2010 10:38 am Unless things have changed, which I doubt they have, the Eva Store DOES NOT ship internationally. You would need to either find it at a second hand retailer, or employ a proxy buyer.

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Thu Apr 22, 2010 10:41 am Ok noted, and on a final note before closing this, would merch and such like that belong in this discussion area or else?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Apr 22, 2010 10:56 am ProfessorKaos64 wrote: Ok noted, and on a final note before closing this, would merch and such like that belong in this discussion area or else?

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Apr 22, 2010 5:37 pm It only lasts 5 minutes. You don't want it.
